scripts.dev: pnpm run dev:api & pnpm run dev:web
scripts.project:setup: pnpm install && cd packages/shared && npx tsc -b && cd ../../apps/api && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push --force-reset && npx prisma db seed
scripts.project:validate: cd packages/shared && npx tsc -b && cd ../../apps/api && npx tsc --noEmit && cd ../web && npx tsc --noEmit && pnpm run build
